title: Update eslint-plugin-react to version 4.2.3 🚀
body:
Hello :wave: :rocket::rocket::rocket: [eslint-plugin-react](https://www.npmjs.com/package/eslint-plugin-react) just published its new version 4.2.3, which **is not covered by your current version range**. If this pull request passes your tests you can publish your software with the latest version of eslint-plugin-react – otherwise use this branch to work on adaptions and fixes. Happy fixing and merging :palm_tree: --- [GitHub Release](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/releases/tag/v4.2.3)

Fixed

  • Fix class properties retrieval in prefer-stateless-function (#499)
--- The new version differs by 108 commits . - [`3365231`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/33652317e7f1e96ad0b2377a4bad7d33354038b4) `Update CHANGELOG and bump version` - [`7fd3375`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/7fd3375217ee70fe15ff40d39f5fae1ca98c9cd4) `Fix class properties retrieval in prefer-stateless-function (fixes #499)` - [`f24d0cb`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/f24d0cba38f25d1ed5149f7e073064a634a15f86) `Update CHANGELOG and bump version` - [`dfe9fce`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/dfe9fce2830bbc6a549e9c3a8eb70dc74f32ed48) `Update dependencies` - [`ede5af0`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/ede5af01393667db8f5194903fa429555e5d8d3e) `Update prefer-stateless-function documentation` - [`37fc544`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/37fc544aa87400300d870dfaa78fb6ba06861b1d) `Fix this usage in jsx-no-undef (fixes #489)` - [`259fab4`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/259fab4ed1cb6299eb7059b90c995684a0a4baed) `Fix annotated function detection (fixes #498)` - [`2884a80`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/2884a80513972f6604fd09ae491744a80e01df7e) `Fix detection for direct props in prop-types (fixes #497)` - [`e83079d`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/e83079d82d9852b778ec1b89eb880b93b8b22722) `Add additional test for self-closing-comp` - [`226be21`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/226be211a73f7ebc9c730fec3ff3f4ce42af87f7) `Fix self-closing-comp to treat non-breaking spaces as content (fixes #496)` - [`cfca370`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/cfca370a5d4de6a8a647402c8491e7b6a74c37b6) `Rewrite prefer-stateless-function rule (fixes #491)` - [`426b228`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/426b22890452550ac978e66f2f22a0016dc41788) `Add shared setting for React version` - [`2226204`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/2226204ae35e47bc8d3a37fac55dc31d71868e9c) `Update CHANGELOG and bump version` - [`17f105c`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/17f105c9d4c4413b3bf9d0f058ae4e24b94c8da5) `Fix missing getChildContext lifecycle method in prefer-stateless-function (fixes #492)` - [`ad52cb2`](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/commit/ad52cb2f791e88fa14131935745dfa891b82a1bb) `Update jsx-sort-props documentation` There are 108 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/yannickcr/eslint-plugin-react/compare/1371c76c05c090e195695b2c58aed8ea3ba1273b...33652317e7f1e96ad0b2377a4bad7d33354038b4). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](http://greenkeeper.io/). It keeps your software, up to date, all the time. Tired of seeing this sponsor message? Upgrade to the supporter plan! You'll also get your pull requests faster :zap:
